name: polymath-connector-elastic
description: Elastic / Elasticsearch connector: MCP for index/search + log-search skill that builds time-bounded, field-typed queries and refuses unbounded scans.

elasticEndpoint.title: Elastic endpoint
elasticEndpoint.description: Full URL to the Elasticsearch endpoint (e.g. https://search.example.com:9200) or Elastic Cloud cloud_id.

elasticApiKey.title: Elastic API key
elasticApiKey.description: API key with read access on the indices used for triage. Avoid superuser keys.
